notes.title: What a CDN taught me about AI agents
notes.dek: Three eras, one question: is this thing alive — and can I prove it right now?

notes.title: A green checkmark is not a pulse
notes.dek: Freshness tells you the last time it worked. Liveness is a different question.

notes.title: The deploy that lied
notes.dek: Every gate was green. Production was 36 hours stale. Both were telling the truth.
